strings.ACHIEVEMENT_FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_AIRTIMEACHI: Quam Magissa, in aere per 30 secundos sine contactu cum terra mane.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_ECLIPSEACHI: Quam Magissa, ludum vince super Eclipse 8.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_FAEACHIEVEM: Quam Magissa, 10 Bustling Fungus simul tene (Tempestas Pluviae aut difficultate altior).
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_MASTERYACHI: Quam Magissa, ludum vince aut oblitera super Monsoon.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_SPEEDACHIEV: Quam Magissa, celeritatem volatus 70 m/s vel altiorem per 2 secundos sustine.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_DESCRIPTION: Magissa est mobilis magus parvi radios qui in facultatibus zonae damni incumbit quae turbas hostium inimorum bene tractat.<color=#CCD3E0>Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_NO_JUMP_DESCRIPTION: Magissa cadere labi potest per 5 secundos. Nonnulli impetus <color=#9933CC>Flammam Umbrarum</color> applicare possunt. Pennae Hopoo in 0.5 secunda temporis volatus maximi convertuntur. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_NORMAL_JUMP_DESCRIPTION: Magissa cadere labi potest per 5 secundos. Nonnulli impetus occasionem habent ut <color=#9933CC>Flammam Umbrarum</color> applicent. Quaevis penna Hopoo unum saltum dat. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, novos mundos inquirens quaerens.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Magissa cadere labi potest per 5 secundos. Nonnulli impetus occasionem habent ut <color=#9933CC>Flammam Umbrarum</color> applicent. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_PRIMARY_SLASH_DESCRIPTI: <style=cIsUtility>Flexibilitas</style>. <color=#9933CC>Antenna</color>. Verbera, <style=cIsDamage>200% damni</style> inferens cum occasione 50% ut <color=#9933CC>Flammam Umbrarum</style> applicet. Tertius quisque ictus Flammam Umbrarum applicat, <style=cIsUtility>parvum temporis volatus</style> restituit et <color=#9933CC>duplex damnum</style> infert. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_PRIMARY_WHIP_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsUtility>Flexibilitas</style>. <color=#9933CC>Antenna</color>. Emitte radium transfixientem temporis brevis sine fine, <style=cIsDamage>200% damni</style> inferens cum occasione 50% ut <color=#9933CC>Flammam Umbrarum</style> applicet. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_SCEPTER_RAM_DESCRIPTION: <color=#9933CC>Antenna</color>. <style=cIsUtility>Gravis</style>. Dimidium temporis volatus restituit. Se impetum antee per 1.5 secundos, extendens per 0.5 pro quoque ictu, septum 20% auget et hostes in quos impingis <style=cIsDamage>200-2500% damni</style> inferens cum velocitate motus crescens. <color=#9933CC>Flammam Umbrarum</style> applicat. 3 onera tenet. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_SCEPTER_WELL_DESCRIPTIO: Dimensionem sacculare circum te crea, vicinissimos hostes in centrum trahens et omnibus hostibus intra <style=cIsDamage>160% damni</style> saepe inferens velocitatem impetus augens. Parvam habet occasionem ut <color=#9933CC>Flammam Umbrarum</style> per ictum applicet. In fine erumpe, <style=cIsDamage>400% damni</style> inferens. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_SECONDARY_GUN_DESCRIPTI: Emitte sagittam spectrale, <style=cIsDamage>540% damni</style> inferens. In ictu foramen nigrum creat quod hostes vicinos in se trahit. Si dum lapsu utitur, impetum tuum in ictum redirigit. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_SPECIAL_PILLAR_DESCRIPT: <style=cIsUtility>Flexibilitas</style>. <color=#9933CC>Antenna</color>. Evoca radium energiae, omnibus hostibus intra <style=cIsDamage>700% damni</style> per 0.5 secundos inferens. In vicinum terram intendens piliorem columnam evocat quae <style=cIsDamage>duplum damni</style> infert.</style>Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_SPECIAL_RAM_DESCRIPTION: <color=#9933CC>Antenna</color>. <style=cIsUtility>Gravis</style>. Se impetum antee per 1.5 secundos, septum 10% auget et hostes in quos impingis <style=cIsDamage>200-2500% damni</style> inferens cum velocitate motus crescens. <color=#9933CC>Flammam Umbrarum</style> applicat. 2 onera tenet. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_SPECIAL_WELL_DESCRIPTIO: Dimensionem saccarem circum te crea, saepe omnibus hostibus intra <style=cIsDamage>160% damni</style> inferens velocitatem impetus augens. Parvam habet occasionem ut <color=#9933CC>Flammam Umbrarum</style> per ictum applicet. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_UTILITY_LAUNCH_DESCRIPT: <color=#9933CC>Antenna</color>. <style=cIsUtility>In aerum surge</style>, totum temporis volatus restituens. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
strings.FROSTHEX_ASTERIA_UTILITY_WARP_DESCRIPTIO: <color=#9933CC>Antenna</color>. <style=cIsUtility>Curvatio brevis</style>, in fine erumpens <style=cIsDamage>600% damni</style> inferens. 2 onera tenet. Modus originalis ab Frosthex.
